CrudMethodInfoData Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The CrudMethodInfoData type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
Description
e Returns the OpenAPI description of the method.
HasConfiguration
Returns a flag indicating whether there already is a configuration for this method.
Id
Returns the method identifier for the configuration setting.
Operations
Returns the operation flags for this API method.
TableName
Returns the type of database objects handled by this API method.
Url
Returns the API method URL
